{"id":"claude-updater-dh4","title":"Add release notes CLI command with date filtering","description":"## Context

claude-updater should be a data gathering tool, not an analysis tool. It collects release notes and makes them available for Claude Code to reason about with full context (memory, MCP, project setup).

## Requirements

### New release-notes subcommand
- claude-updater release-notes — show release notes for all tools from the last N days (default: 3)
- claude-updater release-notes --days=7 — configurable time window
- claude-updater release-notes --tool=beads — filter to specific tool
- claude-updater release-notes --json — machine-readable output for piping to Claude Code
- Output should be raw release notes, not AI-summarized

### Release notes cache
- Cache release notes in ~/.cache/claude-updater/release-notes/
- One file per tool, storing releases with dates and content
- On first run (empty cache), pre-populate with last 5 releases per tool
- On subsequent runs, fetch only newer releases
- Cache is append-only (new releases added, old ones kept)

### Separation of concerns
- check — version comparison only, fast, no release notes
- update — apply updates, optionally show what changed
- release-notes — dedicated command for exploring what changed, with date filtering
- Keep existing AI analysis as optional flag (--ai-summary) but not default

### Integration with Claude Code
The intended workflow:
1. claude-updater check runs on startup via cld wrapper — fast version check
2. Periodically: "What changed in my tools recently?" triggers Claude Code to call claude-updater release-notes --days=3 --json and discuss implications
3. Claude Code has context (memory, project setup) to assess what matters

## Technical notes
- Each adapter needs a get_releases(limit: int) method returning list of (version, date, body)
- For GitHub-hosted tools: use gh api with date filtering
- For git-based plugins: parse CHANGELOG.md with date extraction
- Cache format: JSON with {tool: [{version, date, body}...]}","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"malte.sussdorff@cognovis.de","created_at":"2026-03-02T08:34:04Z","created_by":"Malte Sussdorff","updated_at":"2026-03-02T08:34:04Z"}

new_value: release-notes subcommand implemented: --days, --tool, --json, --ai-summary flags, append-only cache, 37 new tests (81 total), live-tested with all adapters
